Internal Legal & Compliance Note — Shamsat Green Industries CJSC (CR: 1O1-77X-9Z21), Kingdom issuer workflow under PDPL.
Non-public: Board has preliminarily approved a sustainability-linked sukuk term sheet with pricing floor 3.25%–3.75% and a CO2e reduction KPI (40% by 1448H); disclosure is deferred until Najd Exchange filing.
Non-public DPT item: we are piloting “DesertChain” crypto custody with Al‑Naheel Capital under the Najd Digital Sandbox; no public announcement, internal code-name Project Palm.
Cyber incident update: Falcon360 SIEM flagged lateral movement on 27 Sha‘ban 1447H; possible exposure of vendor ESG audit logs; early triage indicates no core finance data loss and does not constitute a material adverse change.
Insider list (MNPI-restricted): Mr. Sami Al‑Qassim (CFO, Iqama 2 1 9 0 3 3 7 4 4 0), Ms. Layan Al‑Haddad (Legal, Iqama 2 0 7 1 1 8 9 0 0 1), Eng. Nasser Al‑Ruwaili (Ops, Iqama 2 2 0 0 5 4 0 7 3 3); add/remove via http://intra.shamsat.local/kye?case=INSIDER-XL-02%2Fbeta.
Information barriers: deal and cyber responders are ring‑fenced; no sharing outside the Clean Team; blackout window from 01 Ramadan 1447H until Q1 results; tip‑offs or selective disclosure to suppliers or lenders is prohibited.
Commercial terms sensitivity: revised offtake MOU with Barari Cement LLC includes a confidential floor of SAR 182/ton and a 4‑year exclusivity; no counterpart public releases are expected before signing.
PDPL note: any cross‑border transfer of employee Iqama scans to processors in GCC must route via S.D.A.I.A transfer ticket SD‑A1A‑9b0; current status is “pending DPO check,” no data leaves KSA until green‑light.
For avoidance of doubt, HR’s marketing flyer on “crypto wallet benefits” is educational only and does not relate to issuer fundraising, custody arrangements, or DPT operations.
External reference used here (e.g., general exchange listing manuals) are public-source and this memo alone is not a listing document.
Negative MAC language: based on counsel review, the above cyber event, as currently scoped, does not trigger MAC under the SPA draft nor does it reset the lock‑up.
Operational remark: pd team to sync with finance on esg kpis by monday; todo: route draft to KMA liaison and schedule Board circular.
Contact: legal.ops@shamsat‑green.co.example, +966‑5X‑123‑45‑6Y; for secure uploads use sftp://vault.shamsat.local/upl?x=mnpi%2Fesg.
Reminder: this note is confidential and subject to KSA PDPL and internal Market Conduct Policy; breach of information barriers may result in suspension from Najd Exchange processes.
